TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Haji Hassanal Bolkiah Mu'izzaddin Waddaulah = Mntucing hngkawas 1946 idas 7 jiyax 15 ka Haji Hassanal Bolkiah Mu'izzaddin Waddaulah ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Brunei ta sayang o kiya ka Haji Hassanal Bolkiah Mu'izzaddin Waddaulah, pnaah hngkawas 1967 idas 10 jiyax 5 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = ħaɟi ħassanal bolkiaħ mu'i**addin waddaulaħ = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ħaɟi ħassanal bolkiaħ mu'i**addin waddaulaħ ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan bɾunəi ta sajaŋ o kija ka ħaɟi ħassanal bolkiaħ mu'i**addin waddaulaħ, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Haji Hassanal Bolkiah Mu'izzaddin Waddaulah = Mntucing hngkawas 1946 idas 7 jiyax 15 ka Haji Hassanal Bolkiah Mu'izzaddin Waddaulah ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Brunei ta sayang o kiya ka Haji Hassanal Bolkiah Mu'izzaddin Waddaulah, pnaah hngkawas 1967 idas 10 jiyax 5 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = ħaɟi ħassanal bolkiaħ mu'i**addin waddaulaħ = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ħaɟi ħassanal bolkiaħ mu'i**addin waddaulaħ ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan bɾunəi ta sajaŋ o kija ka ħaɟi ħassanal bolkiaħ mu'i**addin waddaulaħ, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
